evidence.source: GitHub and Railway read-only discovery following the reviewed PR #11 merge; no Supabase, Lovable, DNS or variable re-verification performed in this sprint

railway.note: Staging and production intentionally run different source SHAs after PR #11: staging auto-deployed the merge, production correctly did not. This divergence is the governance model working as intended, not drift.

blockers: Runtime readiness is degraded: staging reports missing CORNERMEX_COMMERCE_MODEL and production lacks all three readiness variables.
The prior successful Railway deployments are REMOVED history entries, so rollback requires a controlled rebuild from the recorded SHA.
The live Railway drift guard has no dedicated credential configured yet (RAILWAY_VIEWER_TOKEN), so live governance verification is currently blocked, not passing.
This drift-guard branch requires independent review before merge.
Public commerce capabilities remain unauthorized and disabled.
nextActions: Review the drift-guard PR at its exact head.
Provision a dedicated Railway Viewer-role read-only credential as a GitHub Actions secret before the live probe can ever report live_governance_verified.
Under separate authorization, restore the required Railway readiness variables and repeat health/readiness verification (see docs/program/NEXT_READINESS_SPRINT.md).
Before any future production activation, record a docs/program/PRODUCTION_ACTIVATION_REQUEST.schema.json instance with every completeness element genuinely green.
